title: Lead Revenue Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
